# h*-vectors and Ehrhart polynomials for GT(λ, 1^|λ|), all partitions |λ| ≤ 8

Weight is always w = (1,...,1) of length |λ|.
Trailing zeros omitted from h*.
**Ehrhart ×d!** lists coefficients [a₀, a₁, ..., aₐ] of the integer polynomial d!·P(n) = a₀ + a₁n + ... + aₐnᵈ.
Time is wall-clock time including process startup (~2ms overhead).

|---|-----|------|----|------------|
| (1) | 0 | 2ms | [1] | [1] |
